message:
Add CI workflow, fix deploy, add pnpm lockfile

- Add CI workflow that runs vitest on push/PR
- Fix deploy workflow: remove outdated D1/KV provisioning, use current
  Durable Objects + R2 architecture, add vite build step
- Add pnpm-lock.yaml so CI can cache dependencies
- Add packageManager field to package.json
- Gitignore SSH host keys

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+
+jobs:
+  test:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          submodules: true
+
+      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
+        with:
+          version: 10
+
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: "22"
+          cache: "pnpm"
+
+      - run: pnpm install
+
+      - name: Run tests
+        run: pnpm test

@@ -4,22 +4,24 @@ on:
   push:
     branches:
       - main
-  repository_dispatch:
+  workflow_dispatch:
 
 jobs:
   deploy:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     name: Deploy
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          submodules: true
 
       - uses: goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2
         with:
           version: 0.15.2
 
       - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
         with:
-          version: 9
+          version: 10
 
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
@@ -31,20 +33,13 @@ jobs:
       - name: Build WASM
         run: pnpm run build:wasm
 
-      - name: Provision resources
-        uses: cloudflare/wrangler-action@v3
-        with:
-          command: |
-            d1 create gitmode-meta --json || true
-            r2 bucket create gitmode-objects || true
-            kv namespace create gitmode-refs || true
-          apiToken: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}
-          accountId: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}
+      - name: Build
+        run: pnpm run build
 
-      - name: Initialize database
+      - name: Provision R2 bucket
         uses: cloudflare/wrangler-action@v3
         with:
-          command: d1 execute gitmode-meta --file=src/schema.sql
+          command: r2 bucket create gitmode-objects || true
           apiToken: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}
           accountId: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}

@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@
   "private": true,
   "description": "Git server on Cloudflare Workers — Zig WASM engine with SIMD",
   "type": "module",
+  "packageManager": "pnpm@10.21.0",
   "scripts": {
     "build:wasm": "cd wasm && zig build wasm -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall && mkdir -p ../src/wasm && wasm-metadce --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --graph-file exports.json zig-out/bin/gitmode.wasm -o ../src/wasm/gitmode.dce.wasm && wasm-opt -Oz --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int ../src/wasm/gitmode.dce.wasm -o ../src/wasm/gitmode.wasm && rm ../src/wasm/gitmode.dce.wasm",
     "build": "vite build",
